Mistral AI provides state-of-the-art ope: Mistral AI provides state-of-the-art open-weight and hosted language models for text generation, embeddings, and reasoning tasks.
You can obtain your API key from the Mis: You can obtain your API key from the Mistral AI dashboard. Go to https://console.mistral.ai, generate an API key, and paste it here.
Route Mistral calls through your Cloudfl: Route Mistral calls through your Cloudflare AI Gateway. Provide a Mistral API key (key-in-request mode) or leave it blank if your gateway has Mistral configured as a stored key (BYOK).
Your Cloudflare account ID (visible on t: Your Cloudflare account ID (visible on the AI Gateway dashboard).
The slug of your AI Gateway (visible on: The slug of your AI Gateway (visible on the gateway settings page).
Optional. Required only if your gateway: Optional. Required only if your gateway has authentication enabled. Sent as cf-aig-authorization.
Optional. Provide your Mistral key for k: Optional. Provide your Mistral key for key-in-request mode. Leave blank if Cloudflare injects the key via stored credentials (BYOK).
Extract text from PDFs and images using: Extract text from PDFs and images using mistral-ocr-latest. To OCR a file from a previous step, run Upload File first (with purpose=ocr) and pass the returned id here.
Creates new embedding in Mistral AI.
Upload a file to Mistral AI (e.g., for f: Upload a file to Mistral AI (e.g., for fine-tuning or context storage).
Retrieves a list of available Mistral AI: Retrieves a list of available Mistral AI models.
Make a custom API call to a specific end: 将一个自定义 API 调用到一个特定的终点
Question: Question
Select a Mistral model. List is fetched: Select a Mistral model. List is fetched live from your account.
Controls randomness: Lowering results in: Controls randomness: Lowering results in less random completions. As the temperature approaches zero, the model will become deterministic and repetitive.
An alternative to sampling with temperat: An alternative to sampling with temperature, called nucleus sampling, where the model considers the results of the tokens with top_p probability mass. So 0.1 means only the tokens comprising the top 10% probability mass are considered.
The input text for which to create an em: The input text for which to create an embedding.
The file to upload (max 512MB).For fine: The file to upload (max 512MB).For fine tuning purspose provide .jsonl file.
Where the document or image to OCR comes: Where the document or image to OCR comes from.
Mistral file ID (uploaded earlier with p: Mistral file ID (uploaded earlier with purpose=ocr)
A Mistral file ID returned from a prior: A Mistral file ID returned from a prior Upload File step (purpose=ocr).
Public URL of the PDF or image to OCR.
Optional zero-based page indices to proc: Optional zero-based page indices to process. Leave empty for all pages.
Return embedded images encoded as base64: Return embedded images encoded as base64 alongside the Markdown.
